reviews.comment:
Las habitaciones son muy pequeñas y les falta mantenimiento.El desayuno dos medialunas y un café.No volvería.

(Translated by Google)
The rooms are very small and lack maintenance. Breakfast was two croissants and a coffee. I wouldn't return.

reviews.comment:
Un desastre!!! Baños sucios; sin agua tanto cuando paramos para la ida y a los quince días cuando paramos nuevamente , y en pandemia es inadmisible.
La atención del personal que despacha  combustible deja mucho que desear. Es una mala fama para el ACA.

(Translated by Google)
A disaster!!! Filthy bathrooms; no water both when we stopped on the way there and again two weeks later when we stopped again, and during a pandemic, this is unacceptable.
The service from the gas station attendants leaves much to be desired. It's a bad reputation for the ACA.

reviewReply.comment:
Lamentamos su experiencia norma solamente comentarle que en más de 60 años de este establecimiento no falto nunca el agua ni un solo día 
La esperamos nuevamente

reviews.comment:
Es una YPF.... Cargué nafta yendo a Bariloche, mala atención, mala actitud, no me ofrecieron limpiar lo vidrios ni revisar el agua y encima no aceptan la tarjeta PREVIAJE (raro, porque todas las ypf la aceptan).

(Translated by Google)
It's a YPF.... I filled up on gas on my way to Bariloche, bad service, bad attitude, they didn't offer to clean the windows or check the water and on top of that they don't accept the PREVIAJE card (strange, because all YPF stations accept it).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLc0lTZGlnRRAB
